failedAssertions.reason: Observed HTTP 404 {"error":"Scenario not found"} from GET /api/scenarios/:a/diff/:b with non-existent IDs; contract expects HTTP 200 with empty arrays.

appliedUpdates.description: Corrected API healthcheck to avoid false negatives by checking base server reachability instead of expecting successful POST /api/auth/login with empty body.
Added curl concurrency classification and Flow Validator Guidance sections for curl and agent-browser isolation boundaries.
Recorded automation frictions and stable workarounds from flow reports (network capture fallback, prompt sequencing, file input change dispatch for CSV import).
